steps.text: The light turns a sickly purple. A tall, pale figure unfolds from the trees. The forest goes silent.

steps.speaker: Orochimaru
steps.text: Kukuku... such lovely eyes, Uchiha. A lineage of perfection — wasted on a mere child.

steps.speaker: Orochimaru
steps.text: Why settle for the crumbs the village offers, when I can give you the entire feast of power? But first — show me your bonds are worth anything at all.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: Stay back, snake! Team 7 — together, now!

boss.victory_text: The genin dissolves into mud and snakes. You hold both scrolls — the prelims are passed.
